manifest: P1-T2 free-path ConvExp — Gate-2 human-review manifest
purpose: Consolidated anomalous / NEED_HUMAN items for AI-analyzer review before Gate-2 sign-off. NO imputation performed; every item is quarantined with its provenance.

need_human_funds.note: matched_registrant shows the series-match verdict; 'series_exact' means the correct pre-conversion series WAS located but held no share-denominated common equity (bond/commodity/derivative fund).

by_failure_vector.description: OpenFIGI mapped the CUSIP to a ticker, but that ticker is absent from SEC company_tickers.json -> foreign / ADR / delisted / share-class symbol with no US-filer CIK, so no XBRL shares-outstanding denominator.
Ticker resolves to a US CIK but its XBRL dei:EntityCommonStockSharesOutstanding concept returned no usable fact on/before the wave date.
N-PORT holding carried a valid CUSIP but no ticker, and OpenFIGI (or its absence) did not resolve one.
Denominator (shares outstanding) yielded implied ownership >100%; dropped as stale/wrong shares-out (see stale_shares_gt1 section).
